rulings.Case Title: DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion (1) To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Testimony Of Keyhan Mohanna, (2) For The Production Of Documents, (3) To Overrule Defendant'S Objections To The Discovery And (4) For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 17, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC's Motion (1) To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Testimony Of Keyhan Mohanna, (2) For The Production Of Documents, (3) To Overrule Defendant'S Objections To The Discovery And (4) For Monetary Sanctions This motion will be heard at 2:00 p.m. in Department 501 by the honorable A. James Robertson. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Deposition and for Production of Documents is GRANTED. Defendant to appear for deposition and produce documents (may be accompanied by proper Privilege Log re: attorney-client privilege) on August 7, 2018 (or any other mutually agreeable date no later than August 10, 2018). No sanctions granted at this time. Request for sanctions may be renewed if Defendant fails to comply with the order. This is an unlawful detainer action, a summary proceeding. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that lengthy notices of unavailability filed in this action by defendant and his counsel are proper and do not interfere with the summary nature of the proceedings. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK, N.A AS TRUSTEE VS. RAUL VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Set Aside Default And Notice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 17, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT PEDRO RIVAS' Motion To Set Aside Default GRANTED. Judgment shall be vacated as to Pedro Rivas only. Plaintiff to submit an amended judgment, excluding Mr. Rivas, and present it to the Court at the hearing. Plaintiff to present this order to the Sheriff. Sheriff may proceed with the execution of the writ of possession for all spaces at the premises except for one room occupied by Rivas and his family. Plaintiff to prepare an order in conformity with this tentative identifying with requisite specificity the room not subject to the writ. Mr. Rivas to fully cooperate in drafting of the order. Mr. Rivas to post $1,557 with the Court no later than 4:00 p.m. on July 17, 2018. Thereafter, Mr. Rivas to obtain a copy of the Complaint from the Records Department and file an answer no later than July 17, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)
